productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex Adicolor Navy Blue Cap
description: Created using 100% cotton fabric, this cap from adidas is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Crown made of cotton fabric with embroidered eyelets to offer breathable comfort to the head Curved visor with stitch detailing Branding embroidered in white on the crown Adjustable back strap with a branded buckle for a customised Fit Cap care Hand wash in cold water Do not tumble dry or dry clean
